title: Netsh.exe
html:
Netsh.exe

Netsh is a Windows tool used to manipulate network interface settings.

Execute

Proxy execution of .dll

netsh.exe add helper {PATH_ABSOLUTE:.dll}

Use Netsh in order to execute a .dll file and also gain persistence, every time the netsh command is called — MITRE: T1546.007 — Privileges: Admin
